name: Camper's Candy
recipeIngredient: Double boiler for melting and cooking
recipeInstructions:
1. In the double boiler, melt chocolate chips and peanut butter.
2. Stir to mix together.
3. Remove from heat and add 3 cups Rice Krispies.
4. Mix well and make sure to coat Rice Krispies.
5. Spread in a buttered pan.
6. Refrigerate until firm.
7. Cut into pieces. Thickness depends on the size of the pan.
8. Keep refrigerated.
